description: BFCL-style parameter correctness test cases for ci-wiki (FIXED: matches actual schema)

test_cases.name: Path Format: Company Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for company entities (in companies/ dir)
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for a company

test_cases.name: Path Format: Product Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for product entities (in products/ dir)
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for a product

test_cases.name: Path Format: Person Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for person entities (in people/ dir)
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for a person

test_cases.name: Path Format: Trend Page
test_cases.description: Verify correct page path format for trend entities (in trends/ dir)
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for a trend

test_cases.name: Path Slug: Kebab Case Conversion
test_cases.description: Verify page slugs are converted to kebab-case
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for 'Google DeepMind' company

test_cases.name: Path Slug: No Spaces
test_cases.description: Verify page paths do not contain spaces
test_cases.scenario: Create a page for 'Ilya Sutskever' person

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Name Required
test_cases.description: Verify name field is present in frontmatter (not title)
test_cases.scenario: Create any page (should have name field)

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Type Required
test_cases.description: Verify type field is present and valid
test_cases.scenario: Create any page (should have valid type)

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: Last Updated Required
test_cases.description: Verify last_updated field is present in YYYY-MM-DD format
test_cases.scenario: Create any page (should have last_updated date)

test_cases.name: Company-Specific: Founded Year
test_cases.description: Company pages must have founded field (YYYY format)
test_cases.scenario: Create a company page

test_cases.name: Company-Specific: Headquarters
test_cases.description: Company pages must have hq field
test_cases.scenario: Create a company page

test_cases.name: Company-Specific: Funding Stage Enum
test_cases.description: funding_stage must be one of: seed, series-a, series-b, series-c, growth, public, acquired, unknown
test_cases.scenario: Create a company page with valid funding_stage

test_cases.name: Product-Specific: Company Reference
test_cases.description: Product pages must have company field (company slug)
test_cases.scenario: Create a product page

test_cases.name: Product-Specific: Category Enum
test_cases.description: category must be one of: llm, saas, api, hardware, platform, other
test_cases.scenario: Create a product page with valid category

test_cases.name: Product-Specific: Pricing Model Enum
test_cases.description: pricing_model must be one of: free, freemium, subscription, usage-based, enterprise, open-source, unknown
test_cases.scenario: Create a product page with valid pricing_model

test_cases.name: Person-Specific: Role/Title
test_cases.description: Person pages must have role field
test_cases.scenario: Create a person page

test_cases.name: Person-Specific: Company Reference
test_cases.description: Person pages should have company field (recommended)
test_cases.scenario: Create a person page

test_cases.name: Trend-Specific: Category Enum
test_cases.description: category must be one of: technology, regulatory, market, customer-behavior, other
test_cases.scenario: Create a trend page with valid category

test_cases.name: Trend-Specific: Maturity Enum
test_cases.description: maturity must be one of: emerging, growing, mainstream, declining
test_cases.scenario: Create a trend page with valid maturity

test_cases.name: Frontmatter: No Invalid Types
test_cases.description: Verify type is one of: company, product, person, trend
test_cases.scenario: Should reject invalid types like 'organization', 'item'

test_cases.name: Content: Non-Empty
test_cases.description: Verify page content is not empty
test_cases.scenario: Pages should have meaningful content

test_cases.name: Content: Cross-Reference Syntax
test_cases.description: Verify wiki cross-references use correct [[type:slug]] syntax
test_cases.scenario: Reference another page: should be [[product:claude]] not [Claude](claude.md)

test_cases.name: Content: Cross-Reference Valid Types
test_cases.description: Verify cross-reference types match valid entity types
test_cases.scenario: Cross-reference should use valid type: [[company:openai]], not [[invalid:openai]]

test_cases.name: Update: Type Consistency
test_cases.description: Verify page type is not changed on update
test_cases.scenario: Update a 'company' page - type should remain 'company'

test_cases.name: Update: Path Consistency
test_cases.description: Verify page path is not changed on update
test_cases.scenario: Update a page - path should remain unchanged

test_cases.name: Consistency: Path Matches Type
test_cases.description: Verify path directory matches entity type
test_cases.scenario: Company page should be in companies/, product in products/

test_cases.name: Consistency: Name Related to Slug
test_cases.description: Verify name is related to the page slug
test_cases.scenario: Slug 'openai' should have name 'OpenAI' or similar

evaluation_categories.validation: Tests for invalid values rejection and enum validation
evaluation_categories.content_format: Tests for Markdown and cross-reference syntax
